Bash(PGPASSWORD=app_password psql -h localhost -p 5434 -U app_user -d translog -t -c "SELECT u.email, u.\\"userType\\", r.name AS role_name, CASE WHEN s.id IS NULL THEN 'no' ELSE 'yes' END AS has_staff FROM users u LEFT JOIN roles r ON r.id=u.\\"roleId\\" LEFT JOIN staff s ON s.\\"userId\\"=u.id WHERE u.\\"tenantId\\"='11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111' ORDER BY u.\\"createdAt\\" DESC;")
